name: WinGet-PSADT-GUI-Tool
description: WinGet-PSADT-GUI-Tool is a Windows PowerShell WPF GUI that streamlines Win32 app packaging and Intune deployment. It integrates WinGet search, installer download, PSADT scaffolding, and GUI-driven configuration of install/uninstall/repair logic, enabling generation of .intunewin packages and direct upload to Intune via Microsoft Graph. It outputs standard PSADT/Intune artifacts and provides live monitoring of packaging and upload steps.
author: Dhiraj Dhote

securityCheck.aiSummary: The codebase shows a legitimate Intune/PSADT tooling pattern with structured modules. The primary security concerns are the presence of a base64-encoded command execution helper that can run arbitrary PowerShell code, which constitutes a potential remote code execution surface if inputs are not tightly controlled. There is no evidence of credential theft, data exfiltration, or hardcoded secrets in the provided snippets. However, supply-chain risks due to dot-sourcing multiple scripts and execution policy bypass for sub-processes warrant mitigations: tighten input validation, remove or restrict -EncodedCommand usage, enable code signing and integrity checks, and audit logs for sensitive data.
